text: I move through these spaces, feeling a sense of isolation and intrigue. The emptiness of the hallway invites contemplation, yet the bright lights and emergency symbols stir a sense of vigilance. Entering the colorful, information-rich R+D exhibit, I feel curiosity awakening within me. The interplay of technology and human inquiry on display prompts reflection about my own role as both observer and participant. There is a mild tension between safety and discovery, but overall, I am energized by the promise of new understanding.
